description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the node_modules/ directory and uses the node:10 Docker image as the default image, with stages test and deploy. In the test stage add a test_node_10 job that runs "npm install" then "npm test" using node:10, and add test_node_4, test_node_5, test_node_6, test_node_7, test_node_8, and test_node_9 jobs each using their respective node:4, node:5, node:6, node:7, node:8, and node:9 images and executing the same "npm install" and "npm test" commands. In the deploy stage add a publish job that runs only for tags or pipeline triggers, creates an .npmrc file with the NPM_TOKEN secret ("echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}' > .npmrc"), then runs "npm publish", and is configured for the npm environment at https://www.npmjs.com/package/cryptography.
